note: News & Events. One entry = one object. The site AUTOMATICALLY hides anything older than 18 months — the 2020-events-still-live problem can never happen again. Add entries at the top.

items.title: A new faithandresults.com is on the way
items.body: The rebuild puts Freedom, Inc.'s record — FDIC, HUD, Federal Home Loan Bank, NeighborWorks America — on the front door, in type built for every pair of eyes.
